title: Easy MLG
description: Adds some items to make you safer in Minecraft.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RcW9s3bytqk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## **This mod will improve your Minecraft experience**
**If you are an adventurous player who explores the vast world of Minecraft, this is mod for you!**
It adds some items for when you are on mountains or cliffs and want to place that water bucket to stop you from dying but the risk of dying is too much. This adds a water bucket, cobweb and feather which stops you from falling automatically with no need to right click at the perfect moment!

This mod was made by the youtuber Vision - 
[YouTube Link](https://www.youtube.com/@Vision_Minecraft/featured)
